016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc;
017
018import java.net.URI;
019
020/**
021 * Interface with default connection information for Bitcoin JSON-RPC
022 */
023public interface RpcURI {
024    String rpcproto = "http";
025    String rpcssl = "https";
026    String rpchost = "127.0.0.1";
027    String rpcfile = "/";
028
029    int RPCPORT_MAINNET = 8332;
030    int RPCPORT_TESTNET = 18332;
031    int RPCPORT_REGTEST = 18443;  // Was same port as TESTNET until Bitcoin Core 0.16.0
032
033    URI DEFAULT_MAINNET_URI = rpcURI( rpchost, RPCPORT_MAINNET);
034    URI DEFAULT_TESTNET_URI = rpcURI( rpchost, RPCPORT_TESTNET );
035    URI DEFAULT_REGTEST_URI = rpcURI( rpchost, RPCPORT_REGTEST);
036
037    // TODO: Deprecate?
038    URI defaultMainNetURI = DEFAULT_MAINNET_URI;
039    URI defaultTestNetURI = DEFAULT_TESTNET_URI;
040    URI defaultRegTestURI = DEFAULT_REGTEST_URI;
041
042    static URI getDefaultMainNetURI() {
043        return DEFAULT_MAINNET_URI;
044    }
045
046    static URI getDefaultTestNetURI() {
047        return DEFAULT_TESTNET_URI;
048    }
049
050    static URI getDefaultRegTestURI() {
051        return DEFAULT_REGTEST_URI;
052    }
053
054    static URI getDefaultRegTestWalletURI() {
055        return getRegTestWalletURI(rpchost);
056    }
057
058    static URI getRegTestWalletURI(String hostName) {
059        return rpcWalletURI(hostName, RPCPORT_REGTEST, BitcoinExtendedClient.REGTEST_WALLET_NAME);
060    }
061
062    static URI rpcURI(String hostName, int port) {
063        return URI.create(rpcproto + "://" + hostName + ":" + port + rpcfile);
064    }
065
066    static URI rpcWalletURI(String hostName, int port, String walletName) {
067        return URI.create(rpcproto + "://" + hostName + ":" + port + "/wallet/" + walletName);
068    }
069}
